text: Assistant final output should only be stored as logs and must not enter core memory.
用户说 assistant 输出只能进入日志，不能进入核心事实。
WORLD_STATE updates must go through proposal review before being accepted.
默认不要把所有历史上下文注入 prompt。
post hook must not call LLM to summarize history.
需要回查历史时只能按证据 id 读取指定原文。
每次任务前必须先读 WORLD_STATE.md。
Accepted structured cognition should render into WORLD_STATE.
工具结果应该参与置信度评分和 evidence weight。
冲突 resolve 后 loser 应该被 superseded。
pytest suite failed, so tests are not passed.
项目目录不得创建 AGENTS.md。
